what_makes_you_different.counter:
Hey {{first_name}},

Fair question. Three things:

1. We don't just post — we make brands go viral. Whiteout Survival hit 49M views and 100k new users.

2. 79% of our viewers are non-subscribers chosen by the algorithm. You're reaching new people, not just our existing fans.

3. We're picky. If we don't think we can deliver, we'll tell you upfront.

Worth 10 mins to see if there's a fit?

Best,
Imman

need_guaranteed_results.counter:
Hey {{first_name}},

Honestly? No one can guarantee virality — anyone who does is lying.

What I can tell you is our track record: 49M views for Whiteout, 15M+ for Gauth, consistent results across campaigns.

We only take on brands we genuinely believe we can deliver for. Happy to walk you through our process and you can judge for yourself.

Quick call? I'm free {{provide_2_time_slots_with_dates_and_timezone}}.

Best,
Imman

demographics_concern.counter:
Hi {{first_name}},

We have a unique way of reaching specific audiences. 79% of people watching our videos are non-subscribers—these are viewers chosen by the platform's algorithm based on their interests.

So when we promote your content, the majority watching will be people the algorithm identifies as interested in your niche based on their viewing history.

Worth a quick call to dig into this more? I'm free {{provide_2_time_slots_with_dates_and_timezone}}.

Best,
Imman

commission_only.counter:
Hey {{first_name}},

We don't do pure commission/affiliate deals — here's why:

The creative work is actually the bulk of what we do. Coming up with viral concepts takes weeks. We can't invest that without knowing there's commitment on both sides.

That said, we've done hybrid structures for the right brands. Worth a quick call to explore what might work?

I'm free {{provide_2_time_slots_with_dates_and_timezone}}.

Best,
Imman
